title: Better zipline
body:
![BETTER_ZIPLINE_HEADER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43800ee7db1fcf326c12902dc67d0082b946e925_0.webp)
# RUS: 
### Простенький текстур пак улучшающий текстуру и модель зиплайна из одноименного мода "[Zipline](https:///modrinth.com/mod/zipline)" от [Tomate0613](https://modrinth.com/user/Tomate0613)

# ENG: 
### A simple texture pack that improves the texture and model of the zipline from the mod of the same name "[Zipline](https:///modrinth.com/mod/zipline)" by [Tomate0613](https://modrinth.com/user/Tomate0613)
